name: pixifact-workspace
description: Pixifact framework、Editor 和 CLI 的 workspace。
author: youxia <243802688@qq.com>

scripts.desktop: cd apps/editor && VITE_PIXIFACT_PROJECT_ROOT=$(pwd)/../.. bunx --no-install tauri dev
scripts.desktop:build: cd apps/editor && VITE_PIXIFACT_PROJECT_ROOT=$(pwd)/../.. bunx --no-install tauri build
scripts.editor:frontend:build: VITE_PIXIFACT_PROJECT_ROOT=$PWD bunx --no-install vite build apps/editor --config vite.config.ts
scripts.release:check: bun run test && bun run build && bun run editor:frontend:build && cd packages/create-pixifact && bun run build && cd ../.. && bun scripts/check-release-packages.mjs
scripts.release:version: changeset version && bun scripts/sync-template-versions.mjs && bun install --lockfile-only
